_comment: Fleet configuration for klan1-tunnel. Copy this to ~/.klan1-tunnel/fleet.json (or /etc/klan1-tunnel/fleet.json) and fill in your own servers. This file is NOT used at runtime; the real config is fleet.local.json (gitignored). See config/README.md for details.

fallback._comment: Optional fallback. Omit the entry to skip this server.

extra._comment: Optional third server. Add as many as you need.

api._comment: Where the klan1-tunnel-server runs. The install.sh uses this to fetch the tunnel private key.

subdomains._comment: Pilot mapping of subdomain number -> ssh remote port on the server. Adjust if your deployment uses a different range.
